name: サトー
prompt:
Create a photorealistic cinematic full-body character portrait for a modern web novel. Preserve silhouette clarity, costume readability, realistic anatomy, realistic fabric texture, and a consistent live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets.
Full-body portrait of Sato for the installment 'おっさんサトーの気ままな休日'. This must be a plain character portrait only, not a poster, not a title image, and not a book cover. Preserve the exact face, age, body impression, ponytail, mustache, and chin beard from the supplied canonical portrait. Show him in grounded spring Sunday Ameri-casual clothing suited for walking between a familiar bakery, an attached kissaten, old bookstores, a shopping street, and a neighborhood supermarket before relaxing with records at home: heather-gray henley T-shirt, faded blue chambray work shirt worn open, dark indigo denim, worn brown leather belt, practical suede work boots, canvas tote, understated wristwatch, calm and quietly satisfied expression. Use a simple realistic street or neutral exterior background with no readable shop signs and no decorative graphic elements. Keep him modest, believable, slightly rugged, and clearly not fast-fashion polished. Absolutely do not add any text, title lettering, Japanese characters, logos, cover design, or watermark anywhere in the frame.
Keep the whole character visible within frame when possible, especially head, key costume details, hands, silhouette, and signature accessories.
Final delivery will be center-cropped to 1080x1920. Keep the face, silhouette, and signature costume details near the center with safe margins.
Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, cropped head, doll-like face, young idol look, clean-shaven face, short hair, exaggerated bodybuilder muscles, fantasy armor, flashy race costume, office suit, luxury resort look, synthetic fast-fashion look, anime pretty-boy look, polished minimalist techwear, poster layout, book cover, title text, Japanese characters, English text, logo, watermark, readable sign, signage, cover typography
